allow: Bash(curl -s -o - -w "\\n---\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n" -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/enquiry -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"name\\":\\"Brandy Test\\",\\"company\\":\\"GiveSuite\\",\\"email\\":\\"brandy@givesuite.com\\",\\"phone\\":\\"+1 555 555 5555\\",\\"country\\":\\"USA\\",\\"remarks\\":\\"End-to-end Mailtrap test. PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 3000,3001,3002,3003,3004 } | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $proc = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Port $\($_.LocalPort\)  PID $\($_.OwningProcess\)  $\($proc.ProcessName\)" })
